---
title: "Reflection Variants"
id: "mod001-se01-sec06-sp03"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec06"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---











---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this guided reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="guided"}
**Personal Reflection**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this open reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="open"}
**Personal Reflection**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this critical reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="critical"}
**Personal Reflection**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp02.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Quiz Variants</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp04.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Self-Check Variants</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
